analytics.subtitle: Monitor user interactions and AI response quality

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage account and organization
settings.viewOnly: This information is view-only and cannot be edited.
settings.contactSupport: Contact support if you need to make changes.

landing.heroDesc: Upload your files, connect messaging channels, and let our AI answer your customers with precision.
landing.feature1Desc: Instant responses to customer questions around the clock without delay.
landing.feature2Desc: Your data and documents are encrypted and protected with the highest privacy standards.
landing.feature3Desc: A detailed dashboard to understand user behavior and improve responses.
landing.whyBuildSubtitle: Discover the benefits of AI-powered customer service
landing.whyFeature1Desc: Upload your documents and let AI learn from them to provide accurate answers
landing.whyFeature2Desc: Deploy on Telegram, WhatsApp, and Web - reach customers everywhere
landing.whyFeature3Desc: Advanced retrieval system provides contextual answers with source citations
landing.whyFeature4Desc: Secure isolated environments for each organization with complete data separation
landing.whyFeature5Desc: Track queries, response times, and user interactions with detailed insights
landing.whyFeature6Desc: Simple setup with just a few lines of code - no complex configuration needed
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in three simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Upload your PDFs, Word documents, or text files to train your chatbot
landing.step2Desc: Our system processes and indexes your content using advanced embeddings
landing.step3Desc: Connect to Telegram, WhatsApp, or embed on your website instantly
landing.footerDesc: An advanced platform for transforming content and documents into intelligent assistants working 24/7.

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Connect chatbot with Telegram and WhatsApp
channels.telegramDesc: Connect your Telegram bot for automated responses
channels.whatsappDesc: Integrate WhatsApp Business API for customer support
channels.saveError: Failed to save settings. Check your token.
channels.botActive: Bot is active and receiving messages
channels.shareBotLink: Share this link with your customers:
channels.telegramConnectHint: Connect your Telegram bot in seconds. Just paste your bot token.
channels.connectingHint: Validating token and registering webhook automatically
channels.webhookAutoSet: Webhook registered automatically. Your bot is ready.
channels.whatsappSoonDesc: WhatsApp Business API integration will be available soon.
channels.step3: Copy the token and click Connect
channels.ngrokHint: Telegram requires a public HTTPS URL. Enter your ngrok URL:
channels.ngrokRequired: Please enter your ngrok URL to register the webhook
channels.whatsappConnectHint: Connect your WhatsApp Business account. Just enter your Access Token and Phone ID.
channels.waCredentialsHint: Get these from Meta Developers → WhatsApp → API Setup
channels.waStep1: Go to Meta Developers → WhatsApp → API Setup
channels.waStep2: Copy Access Token and Phone Number ID
channels.waStep3: Paste them here and click Connect
channels.waWebhookNote: Paste this URL in Meta Developers → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook
channels.webChatActiveDesc: Visitors can now chat with your bot on your website
channels.webChatContactAdmin: Contact admin to activate the Web Chat channel.
